pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — No substantive changes detected on dome site. 8+ consecutive quiet polls. All automated commits (monitor.py, pull_data.py). No manual/substantive changes. Dome V51.0 parameters unchanged.
pipeline_status.analyst: EXP-003 complete (SEC-4.5.9 rewritten, critical d_geo error fixed + Christchurch distance category error + one-version overstatement). EXP-004 pending (Section 4.8 solar angular diameter — ISS-418, ISS-419). gh CLI not authenticated so external reports not checked.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Phase 1 complete (67/67 WINs reviewed). Holistic checks: HOL-NARRATIVE, HOL-TAXONOMY, HOL-CROSSREF complete. Remaining: HOL-HIERARCHY, HOL-TONE, HOL-COMPLETENESS, HOL-STRESSTEST, HOL-REDUNDANCY, HOL-MISSING (6 pending). Digest shows 67 reviews all marked processed but 259 holes with no corresponding open-issues entries — recommend running backfill-issues.js.
pipeline_status.integrity: WARN — 2 broken external links (CUORE + CHAMP), minor prose drift (build+publish will sync). Test suite 1791/1791 pass. All internal anchors, nav chain, data-prose consistency pass. Previously reported broken anchor and dead showTab links confirmed fixed.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes — V51.0 parameters stable, 67 wins/95.2%/same predictions. Eclipse test (Aug 12, 2026) still featured. WIN-010 and WIN-025 still removed (timing audit).

digest_warning.description: digest-reviews.js reports 67 reviews processed but 259 holes with no corresponding open-issues entries. This means backfill-issues.js has not been run against all curmudgeon output. Most of the curmudgeon's per-WIN findings are not tracked as issues.
digest_warning.recommended_action: Run: node build-scripts/backfill-issues.js --workspace . — this will create open-issues entries for all untracked holes. Estimate ~259 new issues, mostly moderate/minor. Run before next decider cycle to enable proper Mode 2 cleanup of all WINs.

infrastructure_alert.issue: apply-patches.js is NOT present in build-scripts/ despite being referenced in CLAUDE.md and previous patch files. Patches in suggested-patches-*.json files require manual application.
infrastructure_alert.action: Sync apply-patches.js from clean clone to workspace, or rebuild from the build pipeline specification in CLAUDE.md.

internal_issues.action_taken: code_analysis_tags added to curmudgeon review files for all three WINs. Run node build-scripts/sync-code-analysis.js --apply --workspace to apply. Tags: WIN-032 (none/relabel=false/post_hoc=true/dome=false), WIN-033 (none/relabel=true/post_hoc=true/dome=false), WIN-065 (none/relabel=true/post_hoc=true/dome=false).

internal_issues.action_taken: LPI link confirmed working in latest integrity report. CUORE sentence in WIN-015 patched (removal) in suggested-patches-2026-04-06T06-35.json.

internal_issues.deferral: DEFERRED: Requires poller to extract Live Power page from dome site. Add to poller configuration as additional tracked page. Infrastructure change, not a wins.json patch.

internal_issues.deferral: DEFERRED: Prose section rewrite needed. λ_g is fitted to H(r) exponential curve with 2 free parameters. Requires expanding generate-html.js SEC-3.1 prose. Not wins.json patchable.

internal_issues.deferral: DEFERRED: Prose fix in generate-html.js SEC-3.1. Add cross-reference to WIN-001 finding that patent 787412 doesn't contain the cited formula. Simple prose edit.

internal_issues.deferral: DEFERRED: Prose rewrite of SEC-3.2 required. Not wins.json patchable. HIGH PRIORITY — factual error in visible section. Recommend assigning to analyst after EXP-004 completes.

internal_issues.description: SEC-3.2 completely ignores dome's E-PRED-B counterargument (Hartland > Ebro despite lower spatial coverage)
internal_issues.deferral: DEFERRED: SEC-3.2 prose expansion needed. E-PRED-B is the dome's strongest eclipse rebuttal. Section cannot be credible without addressing it. Assign to analyst alongside ISS-082.

internal_issues.deferral: DEFERRED: Factual error in SEC-3.2 prose. Requires rewriting the eclipse methodology description. Not wins.json patchable.

internal_issues.deferral: DEFERRED: Either add path geometry to SEC-3.2 or fix the cross-reference in Kill-Shot Test 5. Prose fix.

code_analysis_updates.notes: New Jerusalem North Pole Axis — purely theological, no code, not relabeling physics. Post-hoc because it's a static text assertion.
Sigma Octantis dimness uses 'aetheric depth' to relabel atmospheric extinction without adding quantitative content. No code in dome repository.
Polaris systematic excess relabels standard celestial navigation as dome-specific prediction. +0.27° within error budget. No monitoring script.

recommended_actions.action: Apply patches from suggested-patches-2026-04-06T06-35.json: (1) Remove CUORE sentence in WIN-015 detail_evidence, (2) Update CHAMP URL in WIN-039 detail_evidence. Note: apply-patches.js is ABSENT from build-scripts/ — apply manually.

After ISS-082/083/084 SEC-3.2 fixes: rewrite eclipse analysis section to use dual-baseline BOU/W004 prediction, remove 1.672-as-eclipse-factor error, and address E-PRED-B dome counterargument. Recommend assigning to analyst after EXP-004.
